findings.line: The lead was no longer miles. It was ovens.
findings.reason: KILL - fragment pivot; the negative half is scaffolding and the positive half carries the meaning.
findings.suggestedFix: The lead was measured in ovens now.

findings.line: Bells thin in the damp air, meant to order a morning, not warn a wall.
findings.deletionTest: Bells thin in the damp air, meant to order a morning.
findings.reason: KILL - direct contrast pivot; the sentence lands on contrast instead of naming the concrete sound directly.
findings.suggestedFix: Bells thinned through the damp air, the sound of an ordinary morning.

findings.line: Not one more store. Not one more lane.
findings.reason: KILL - chained negation fragments; the paragraph improves when the rejected counts are removed and the prose proceeds directly to the real conclusion.

audits.dominantPattern: Pattern 5 abstraction and infrastructure agency laundering

findings.line: The road north of Hearthglen had quit pretending to be a road.
findings.subject: The road north of Hearthglen
findings.realAgent: wagon damage, dried mud, and road breakdown visible in the ruts and shoulder
findings.reason: KILL - geography is given self-conscious deception instead of naming the physical damage.
findings.suggestedFix: North of Hearthglen, the road had broken down into ruts and shoulder.

findings.line: Habit still ran the place, and habit had always been the plague's ally.
findings.subject: Habit
findings.realAgent: workers, guards, and civilians continuing their routine without understanding the threat
findings.reason: KILL - abstraction is made the governing agent when the people following routine are the concrete cause.
findings.suggestedFix: People still moved by routine there, and that made them easy for the plague.

findings.line: The room gave one last drag against the staff, then let go.
findings.subject: The room
findings.realAgent: the remaining pull in the contaminated grain resisting Jaina's working
findings.reason: KILL - the location is carrying the resistance instead of the magical pull inside it.
findings.suggestedFix: The pull in the grain dragged once more against the staff, then broke.

findings.line: The yard outside killed the victory at once.
findings.subject: The yard outside
findings.realAgent: Jaina seeing civilians already carrying and eating bread from the infected network
findings.reason: KILL - scenery is assigned the decisive emotional action instead of the concrete sight in the yard doing that work.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina lost the victory the moment she saw the yard outside.

findings.line: All around them, the city kept confessing.
findings.subject: the city
findings.realAgent: visible bread traffic, open kitchens, and civilians carrying proof of how far the contamination had spread
findings.reason: KILL - the city is given human confession instead of naming the accumulating visible evidence.
findings.suggestedFix: All around them, more proof kept piling up.

findings.line: The city had already answered her.
findings.subject: The city
findings.realAgent: the open shutters, scraped plates, bread deliveries, and already-fed households on the ride back
findings.reason: KILL - the abstraction is answering for a chain of concrete signs the prose already has available.
findings.suggestedFix: She had her answer already: open shutters, scraped plates, bread on the road.

audits.cleanReason: I checked the chapter-wide counts for corner-of-mouth beats, marked uses, tightened/eased, eye/gaze beats, weight metaphors, and performance dialogue tags. The chapter stays within cap on all tracked tics; the matched instances are either single-use, literal, or tactical/character-specific rather than generic excess.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A fails because the chapter contains six MODERATE intent-smear kills plus three MILD negation kills; any MODERATE kill fails the pass.
